Records.authors: Bloch, Spencer, Kerr, Matt, Vanhove, Pierre
Records.description: Three-loop banana self-energy in d=2 with four equal-mass propagators. Graph hypersurface is a K3 surface (Picard number 19). Result expressed via elliptic trilogarithms. At t=0: 7*zeta(3). Confirms Broadhurst conjecture relating t=1 value to L-function of K3.
Three-loop equal-mass banana graph. 3x3 coupled DE equivalent to third-order ODE (symmetric square). Homogeneous solutions are products of complete elliptic integrals.

Records.authors: Bönisch, Kilian, Duhr, Claude, Fischbach, Fabian, Klemm, Albrecht, Nega, Christoph
Records.description: Three-loop equal-mass banana in d=2-2eps. Associated CY geometry is K3 surface with Picard number 19. 3rd-order PF operator is symmetric square of 2-loop operator. Weight-3 iterated Eisenstein series.

Records.authors: Broedel, Johannes, Duhr, Claude, Dulat, Falko, Marzucca, Robin, Penante, Brenda, Tancredi, Lorenzo
Records.description: Three-loop banana (watermelon) graph with four equal non-zero internal masses. 4 master integrals (3 non-trivial + 1 tadpole). Full analytic result at eps=0 in d=2-2*eps as iterated integrals of modular forms for Gamma_1(6) and as elliptic multiple polylogarithms. Uniform transcendental weight 1.
Records.location: eq.(2.1), Section 2; results eq.(4.4), eq.(4.8), eq.(5.14)

Records.description: Three-loop equal-mass banana graph in d=2-2eps. The underlying geometry is a K3 surface whose Picard-Fuchs operator is the symmetric square of the equal-mass sunrise elliptic operator. 4 master integrals. Two new iterated integral functions G_1 and G_2 are needed for epsilon-factorisation (G_1 is an integral of varpi_0^2 times a rational function; G_2 is an iterated integral involving G_1). Griffiths transversality conditions used to eliminate second derivatives of the period. Reproduces the result of Pogel-Wang-Weinzierl.

Three-loop equal-mass banana integral in D=2-2eps dimensions. Related to a Calabi-Yau 2-fold (K3 surface). The Picard-Fuchs operator in D=2 is a symmetric square, so it can be treated with methods similar to the elliptic case. Singular points at x in {4,16}. Four master integrals. The eps-factorised differential equation was previously given in arXiv:2207.12893. First appearance of non-polylogarithmic differential one-forms (quasi-Eichler) at modular weight 2.

Records.authors: Pögel, Sebastian, Wang, Xing, Weinzierl, Stefan
Records.description: Three-loop equal-mass banana in D=2-2eps. 4 massive propagators, K3 geometry. Epsilon-factorised DE with 6-letter alphabet of meromorphic modular forms for Gamma_1(6). Results to eps^6.
